creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Looks like the ports were added back in May and updated in September, just before the branch.  I don't see why they would not be included in the latest quarterly branch.

<<<ROOT@coral.acadix>>> /usr/ports/x11-fonts/noto-sans 1050 # git log .

commit d27431baed19ab5f5d985aa09278a12d11297dcc
Author: Po-Chuan Hsieh <sunpoet@FreeBSD.org>
Date:   Thu Sep 26 01:48:31 2024 +0800

    x11-fonts/noto-sans: Update to 2.014
    
    Changes:        https://github.com/notofonts/latin-greek-cyrillic/releases

commit f6cd72be656babd4190878c18dc4b882a718e7b4
Author: Po-Chuan Hsieh <sunpoet@FreeBSD.org>
Date:   Tue May 14 02:18:37 2024 +0800

    x11-fonts/noto-sans: Add noto-sans 2.013
